mapper.select:
select for_code from appr_form where for_code = #{forCode} and com_id = #{comId}
and for_id != #{forId}
select com_id as comId, com_name as companyName from company where com_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by com_name asc
mapper.insert: insert into appr_form (com_id, for_code, for_title, for_content, for_status) values (#{comId},#{forCode},#{forTitle},#{forContent},#{forStatus})
mapper.update: update appr_form set com_id = #{comId}, for_code = #{forCode}, for_title = #{forTitle}, for_content = #{forContent}, for_status = #{forStatus} where for_id = #{forId}
